The '''''Imperator''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. During the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] push to take [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], intelligence indicated that a Star Destroyer named ''Imperator'' was part of the defensive fleet guarding the Galactic capital. It was apparently a well-regarded ship, but it is implied that that the squadron defending Coruscant was composed entirely of ''Victory''-class Star Destroyers, which would suggest that this ''Imperator'' belonged to this class of smaller, older Star Destroyers.<ref name="WG" />

It is known that this ''Imperator'', along with a ship named [[Emperor's Will (Victory-class)|''Emperor's Will'']], were sent from Coruscant by [[Ysanne Isard]] shortly before the New Republic [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|assault]], to prepare for the transfer of the seat of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to another planet. In fact, the ''Imperator'' was reassigned to the [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]], and thus was taken over by the [[Yevetha]]ns.<ref name="WG" />
